/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsmart_turtle_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libsmart_turtle_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/smart_turtle_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/smart_turtle_interface/msg/detail/turtle_command__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/abouzeid/smart_turtle_ws/build/smart_turtle_interface:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libsmart_turtle_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
